item.title: Microsoft OST to PST Converter Free Download [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Microsoft OST to PST Converter Free Download [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: kdetools
item.itunes:summary:
Microsoft OST to PST Converter Free Download
(Utilities)
Microsoft OST to PST Converter Free is proficient tool for converting offline [offline storage table] OST files to Outlook [personal storage table] with emails, contacts, calendar, tasks, attachments etc. KDETools OST to PST Converter tool is a helpful and faster solution to repair corrupt OST files and Convert OST to PST file format, Office 365, Google Mail, Online Outlook, Yahoo, G Suite etc.




[read more]
item.description:
Microsoft OST to PST Converter Free Download
(Utilities)
Microsoft OST to PST Converter Free is proficient tool for converting offline [offline storage table] OST files to Outlook [personal storage table] with emails, contacts, calendar, tasks, attachments etc. KDETools OST to PST Converter tool is a helpful and faster solution to repair corrupt OST files and Convert OST to PST file format, Office 365, Google Mail, Online Outlook, Yahoo, G Suite etc.




[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Microsoft OST to PST Converter Free Download
(Utilities)
Microsoft OST to PST Converter Free is proficient tool for converting offline [offline storage table] OST files to Outlook [personal storage table] with emails, contacts, calendar, tasks, attachments etc. KDETools OST to PST Converter tool is a helpful and faster solution to repair corrupt OST files and Convert OST to PST file format, Office 365, Google Mail, Online Outlook, Yahoo, G Suite etc.




[read more]

item.title: Moto Widget [Virtualization]
item.itunes:title: Moto Widget [Virtualization]
item.itunes:author: meoify
item.itunes:summary:
Moto Widget
(Virtualization)
Moto Widget shows the time, weather, Google Fit data and more.
Moto Widget lets you see the date, time, weather and more at a glance. You can view the widget in Moto's iconic circle style or in plain text. The widget also lets you easily access a separate weather page where you can get more detailed information.

When you tap on the down arrow in the Beyond widget, you'll cycle through the date and time, weather, dual time and your steps recorded in Google Fit. Moto Widget lets you easily get the information you need right when you need it.

You can also choose to use the Classic battery ring widget or the Clean rectangle widget. To choose a widget:
1) Press and hold on a blank space on the Home screen
2) Tap on "Widgets"
3) Scroll down to "Moto Widget"
4) Drag and drop a widget to your Home screen

Try it out today!
Compatible with android 8.0+

Channel: @meoify
Discussion: @meoifydiscussion

My YouTube : https://youtube.com/channel/UCHqdpfbTJENnYdQ-OfyK5WQ
[read more]
item.description:
Moto Widget
(Virtualization)
Moto Widget shows the time, weather, Google Fit data and more.
Moto Widget lets you see the date, time, weather and more at a glance. You can view the widget in Moto's iconic circle style or in plain text. The widget also lets you easily access a separate weather page where you can get more detailed information.

When you tap on the down arrow in the Beyond widget, you'll cycle through the date and time, weather, dual time and your steps recorded in Google Fit. Moto Widget lets you easily get the information you need right when you need it.

You can also choose to use the Classic battery ring widget or the Clean rectangle widget. To choose a widget:
1) Press and hold on a blank space on the Home screen
2) Tap on "Widgets"
3) Scroll down to "Moto Widget"
4) Drag and drop a widget to your Home screen

Try it out today!
Compatible with android 8.0+

Channel: @meoify
Discussion: @meoifydiscussion

My YouTube : https://youtube.com/channel/UCHqdpfbTJENnYdQ-OfyK5WQ
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Moto Widget
(Virtualization)
Moto Widget shows the time, weather, Google Fit data and more.
Moto Widget lets you see the date, time, weather and more at a glance. You can view the widget in Moto's iconic circle style or in plain text. The widget also lets you easily access a separate weather page where you can get more detailed information.

When you tap on the down arrow in the Beyond widget, you'll cycle through the date and time, weather, dual time and your steps recorded in Google Fit. Moto Widget lets you easily get the information you need right when you need it.

You can also choose to use the Classic battery ring widget or the Clean rectangle widget. To choose a widget:
1) Press and hold on a blank space on the Home screen
2) Tap on "Widgets"
3) Scroll down to "Moto Widget"
4) Drag and drop a widget to your Home screen

Try it out today!
Compatible with android 8.0+

Channel: @meoify
Discussion: @meoifydiscussion

My YouTube : https://youtube.com/channel/UCHqdpfbTJENnYdQ-OfyK5WQ
[read more]

item.title: MD Screen Ruler [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: MD Screen Ruler [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: md2222
item.itunes:summary:
MD Screen Ruler
(Graphic Apps)
Screen ruler with simple color picker and screenshot tool. Measures a selected area. Has the magnifier for precise selection.
Overlaps the screen with a transparent window for drawing. The taskbar does not overlap.
Selecting an area with Ctrl key leaves the selection when the mouse button is released. This used for area screenshot.
You can draw on the screen before make screenshot. Use mouse with Shift key. Tools in the screen context menu.
There is also mode for resize and moving capture area.

Hotkeys:
Ctrl-Space, Mouse middle button - Capture current color
Ctrl-C - Capture current color and copy to clipboard
Ctrl-S - Copy screenshot to clipboard
Ctrl-Z - Undo drawn object

0.4.2 - 10 sec delay for screenshot when Alt key pressed. Solid line always for area < 12 px.
0.5.7 - Desktop overlap indicator. Areas menu item.
0.7.4 - Resize area mode

If you cannot draw an area in Manjaro set gtk2/fusion style in Qt5 Settings.

You can extract contents of an AppImage and use one program file if your system has libraries.
./mdruler-074-x86_64.AppImage --appimage-extract
Files will be extracted to "squashfs-root" directory.
The bundle includes files install.sh and uninstall.sh for installing the bin-version.
You can check files for viruses on virustotal.com.

[read more]
item.description:
MD Screen Ruler
(Graphic Apps)
Screen ruler with simple color picker and screenshot tool. Measures a selected area. Has the magnifier for precise selection.
Overlaps the screen with a transparent window for drawing. The taskbar does not overlap.
Selecting an area with Ctrl key leaves the selection when the mouse button is released. This used for area screenshot.
You can draw on the screen before make screenshot. Use mouse with Shift key. Tools in the screen context menu.
There is also mode for resize and moving capture area.

Hotkeys:
Ctrl-Space, Mouse middle button - Capture current color
Ctrl-C - Capture current color and copy to clipboard
Ctrl-S - Copy screenshot to clipboard
Ctrl-Z - Undo drawn object

0.4.2 - 10 sec delay for screenshot when Alt key pressed. Solid line always for area < 12 px.
0.5.7 - Desktop overlap indicator. Areas menu item.
0.7.4 - Resize area mode

If you cannot draw an area in Manjaro set gtk2/fusion style in Qt5 Settings.

You can extract contents of an AppImage and use one program file if your system has libraries.
./mdruler-074-x86_64.AppImage --appimage-extract
Files will be extracted to "squashfs-root" directory.
The bundle includes files install.sh and uninstall.sh for installing the bin-version.
You can check files for viruses on virustotal.com.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
MD Screen Ruler
(Graphic Apps)
Screen ruler with simple color picker and screenshot tool. Measures a selected area. Has the magnifier for precise selection.
Overlaps the screen with a transparent window for drawing. The taskbar does not overlap.
Selecting an area with Ctrl key leaves the selection when the mouse button is released. This used for area screenshot.
You can draw on the screen before make screenshot. Use mouse with Shift key. Tools in the screen context menu.
There is also mode for resize and moving capture area.

Hotkeys:
Ctrl-Space, Mouse middle button - Capture current color
Ctrl-C - Capture current color and copy to clipboard
Ctrl-S - Copy screenshot to clipboard
Ctrl-Z - Undo drawn object

0.4.2 - 10 sec delay for screenshot when Alt key pressed. Solid line always for area < 12 px.
0.5.7 - Desktop overlap indicator. Areas menu item.
0.7.4 - Resize area mode

If you cannot draw an area in Manjaro set gtk2/fusion style in Qt5 Settings.

You can extract contents of an AppImage and use one program file if your system has libraries.
./mdruler-074-x86_64.AppImage --appimage-extract
Files will be extracted to "squashfs-root" directory.
The bundle includes files install.sh and uninstall.sh for installing the bin-version.
You can check files for viruses on virustotal.com.

[read more]

item.title: Camera File Recovery Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Camera File Recovery Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: filerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Camera File Recovery Software
(Office Apps)
Do you want to bring back your misplaced picture files from Semi Professional Camera captured on various occasions in simplified way? Use easy to operate Camera File Recovery Software that provides excellent solution to regain your favourite images from your Specialty Camera even if system generated error messages like ‘Disk not detected’ displayed while accessing your digital camera on your personal computer.

[read more]
item.description:
Camera File Recovery Software
(Office Apps)
Do you want to bring back your misplaced picture files from Semi Professional Camera captured on various occasions in simplified way? Use easy to operate Camera File Recovery Software that provides excellent solution to regain your favourite images from your Specialty Camera even if system generated error messages like ‘Disk not detected’ displayed while accessing your digital camera on your personal computer.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Camera File Recovery Software
(Office Apps)
Do you want to bring back your misplaced picture files from Semi Professional Camera captured on various occasions in simplified way? Use easy to operate Camera File Recovery Software that provides excellent solution to regain your favourite images from your Specialty Camera even if system generated error messages like ‘Disk not detected’ displayed while accessing your digital camera on your personal computer.

[read more]

item.title: GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. It provides users with greater control over their device's charging speed and options to optimize the charging process.
The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

1. Custom Fast Charging mA: This feature allows users to set a custom charging current for their device, enabling them to increase or decrease the charging speed according to their preferences.

2. Fast Charge: The software supports fast charging protocols, enabling devices to charge at a higher rate than standard charging methods, reducing overall charging time.

3. Quick Charge: It integrates Quick Charge technology, which is designed to deliver faster charging speeds on devices that support this standard.

4. Super Fast Charge: The software includes optimizations for super-fast charging, allowing devices to charge at even higher speeds, provided the hardware supports it.

5. Set Smart Charging Limit: Users have the ability to set a smart charging limit, which ensures that their device doesn't overcharge and helps prolong battery lifespan. This feature helps prevent excessive battery wear and reduces the risk of overheating during charging.

6. Disable Smart Charging Limit: In addition to setting a smart charging limit, users also have the option to disable this feature, allowing their device to charge at its maximum capacity without any restrictions.

Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]
item.description:
GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. It provides users with greater control over their device's charging speed and options to optimize the charging process.
The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

1. Custom Fast Charging mA: This feature allows users to set a custom charging current for their device, enabling them to increase or decrease the charging speed according to their preferences.

2. Fast Charge: The software supports fast charging protocols, enabling devices to charge at a higher rate than standard charging methods, reducing overall charging time.

3. Quick Charge: It integrates Quick Charge technology, which is designed to deliver faster charging speeds on devices that support this standard.

4. Super Fast Charge: The software includes optimizations for super-fast charging, allowing devices to charge at even higher speeds, provided the hardware supports it.

5. Set Smart Charging Limit: Users have the ability to set a smart charging limit, which ensures that their device doesn't overcharge and helps prolong battery lifespan. This feature helps prevent excessive battery wear and reduces the risk of overheating during charging.

6. Disable Smart Charging Limit: In addition to setting a smart charging limit, users also have the option to disable this feature, allowing their device to charge at its maximum capacity without any restrictions.

Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. It provides users with greater control over their device's charging speed and options to optimize the charging process.
The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

1. Custom Fast Charging mA: This feature allows users to set a custom charging current for their device, enabling them to increase or decrease the charging speed according to their preferences.

2. Fast Charge: The software supports fast charging protocols, enabling devices to charge at a higher rate than standard charging methods, reducing overall charging time.

3. Quick Charge: It integrates Quick Charge technology, which is designed to deliver faster charging speeds on devices that support this standard.

4. Super Fast Charge: The software includes optimizations for super-fast charging, allowing devices to charge at even higher speeds, provided the hardware supports it.

5. Set Smart Charging Limit: Users have the ability to set a smart charging limit, which ensures that their device doesn't overcharge and helps prolong battery lifespan. This feature helps prevent excessive battery wear and reduces the risk of overheating during charging.

6. Disable Smart Charging Limit: In addition to setting a smart charging limit, users also have the option to disable this feature, allowing their device to charge at its maximum capacity without any restrictions.

Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]

item.title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:author: wusel1007
item.itunes:summary:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
Front-End for ClamAV. Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome
For all users who use KDE and Dolphin: Download and copy the file ClamAV-GUI.desktop into the folder "~/.local/share/kservices5/ServiceMenus" and in the context menu of Dolphin you will find the following entry: scan with Clam-AV. Now you can scan files or folders mit a right click.


[read more]
item.description:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)

[read more]

item.title: Passy - Offline Password Manager [Notes]
item.itunes:title: Passy - Offline Password Manager [Notes]
item.itunes:author: glitterware
item.itunes:summary:
Passy - Offline Password Manager
(Notes)
Store passwords, payment cards notes, ID cards and identities offline and safe, synchronized between all of your devices.
Features:
- Security - All your information is encrypted in AES and stored offline on your devices, providing highest-tier security.
- Synchronization - Share data between separate devices within seconds.
- Entry sharing – Send entries to your friends and family.
- Biometrics - Quickly unlock the app using your fingerprint.
- Multipurpose - Store passwords, payment cards, notes, id cards and identities, all in one place.
- Autofill - Quickly fill fields in apps and websites without having to open the app.
- Browser extension - Use autofill and add new entries on the fly right from your browser. (See https://github.com/GlitterWare/Passy-Browser-Extension)

https://glitterware.github.io/Passy




[read more]
item.description:
Passy - Offline Password Manager
(Notes)
Store passwords, payment cards notes, ID cards and identities offline and safe, synchronized between all of your devices.
Features:
- Security - All your information is encrypted in AES and stored offline on your devices, providing highest-tier security.
- Synchronization - Share data between separate devices within seconds.
- Entry sharing – Send entries to your friends and family.
- Biometrics - Quickly unlock the app using your fingerprint.
- Multipurpose - Store passwords, payment cards, notes, id cards and identities, all in one place.
- Autofill - Quickly fill fields in apps and websites without having to open the app.
- Browser extension - Use autofill and add new entries on the fly right from your browser. (See https://github.com/GlitterWare/Passy-Browser-Extension)

https://glitterware.github.io/Passy




[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Passy - Offline Password Manager
(Notes)
Store passwords, payment cards notes, ID cards and identities offline and safe, synchronized between all of your devices.
Features:
- Security - All your information is encrypted in AES and stored offline on your devices, providing highest-tier security.
- Synchronization - Share data between separate devices within seconds.
- Entry sharing – Send entries to your friends and family.
- Biometrics - Quickly unlock the app using your fingerprint.
- Multipurpose - Store passwords, payment cards, notes, id cards and identities, all in one place.
- Autofill - Quickly fill fields in apps and websites without having to open the app.
- Browser extension - Use autofill and add new entries on the fly right from your browser. (See https://github.com/GlitterWare/Passy-Browser-Extension)

https://glitterware.github.io/Passy




[read more]
